response: Yes, both Daniel Mann and Todd Solondz were directors. Daniel Mann was an American film and television director, while Todd Solondz was an American independent film director known for his work in dark, thought-provoking, and socially conscious satire. Mann directed films such as "Fear, Anxiety & Depression," and Solondz directed films like "Palindromes," "Life During Wartime," and "Welcome to the Dollhouse."
